ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., Match 5, Match 4, Match 3) */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., lottery, scratch card) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was first introduced */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the game will be discontinued (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_structures" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize structure */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prize structure belongs to */,
  "prize_name" TEXT /* Name of the prize (e.g., Match 5, Match 4, Match 3) */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the prize */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of the prize (e.g., cash, merchandise) */,
  "prize_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prize */,
  "prize_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize (e.g., available, awarded, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_structures_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the winner belongs to */,
  "winning_date" TEXT /* Date the winner won */,
  "winner_name" TEXT /* Name of the winner */,
  "winner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the winner */,
  "winner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the winner */,
  "winner_address" TEXT /* Address of the winner */,
  "winner_claimed_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize was claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize fund */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prize fund belongs to */,
  "total_prize_fund" TEXT /* Total amount of the prize fund */,
  "fund_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize fund (e.g., active, depleted) */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fund */,
  "fund_source" TEXT /* Source of the fund (e.g., government, sponsor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_funds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winner_prizes" (
  "prize_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize award */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner the prize was awarded to */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize awarded */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the prize awarded */,
  "prize_claimed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the prize has been claimed */,
  "claim_method" TEXT /* Method by which the prize was claimed (e.g., in-person, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winner_prizes_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winner_prizes_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prize_structures ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize distribution */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize fund being distributed */,
  "total_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners */,
  "total_prize_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of prizes distributed */,
  "distribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_distributions_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES prize_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game instance */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the instance belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game instance was played */,
  "instance_status" TEXT /* Status of the game instance (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "instance_location" TEXT /* Location where the game instance was played (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_instances_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game instance the result belongs to */,
  "num_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winners */,
  "total_prize_amount" TEXT /* Total prize amount awarded */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the game result (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES game_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winner_game_results" (
  "winner_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner result */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner the result belongs to */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game result the winner belongs to */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Prize amount awarded to the winner */,
  "result_claimed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the result has been claimed */,
  "claim_location" TEXT /* Location where the prize was claimed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winner_game_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winner_game_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES game_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the analytic belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., num_winners, total_prize_amount) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., financial, performance) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytic the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analytic_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytic_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytic_id")
)
